name: Mittens
story: Mittens is all fluff and no dignity — mid-groom she'll forget her tongue outside and hold the pose. Her foster family calls it her thinking face.
Under the fur is a social butterfly who follows the household from room to room. She'd suit a family that's home a lot and doesn't mind narration.

medical.notes: Vaccinated and spayed. Needs a weekly brush — she mostly tolerates it.

photoAlt: Mittens, a fluffy brown longhair cat with her tongue peeking out
